disambiguated.context: When I went to pick my car up from the mechanic, there were two women working in the garage that day, one of them a pregnant woman, who was standing next to another employee. I overheard some of their conversation, and it turns out that the pregnant woman was the only one actually on duty, since the other one had an injury recently and had to take some time off.
disambiguated.question: Who is unable to work?
